chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI II Appeal No.55 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ----------------------------------------------------- 03.03.2026 None present for applicant ------------------------------------ Instant II Appeal is pending since 2017 without any progress. This appeal was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 22.11.2017. Thereafter, counsel for appellant filed restoration application and the same was restored vide order dated 29.05.2018. Record reflects that counsel for appellant remained absent on 24.09.2019, 25.02.2020, 27.10.2020, 29.09.2024, 19.12.2025, 27.07.2026 and on two dates of hearings brief was held on behalf of the counsel for appellant on 27.10.2020 and 19.12.2025. Continuous absence of the appellant and his counsel reflects that they have lost their interest to pursue this case, therefore, the same is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
